title: 9 Herbal Essential Oils For Oily Hair
description: Melaleuca alternifolia essential oils contains a high concentration of cineole, terpineol, and linalool, which are its active constituents. Cineole helps to balance the scalp's natural oil production, while terpineol has antiseptic and antifungal properties that reduce the occurrence of scalp irritations. Linalool, an antioxidant, helps to soothe and calm the scalp, reducing inflammation and flaking. The antiseptic properties of terpineol also help to control the growth of bacteria and...
